title: Aio's Extra Structures!
description: A datapack that adds more structures to cobblemon!
body:
# A cobblemon datapack addon that adds a few more structures to your world!
These structures can be found all across your Minecraft world
Biomes ranging from the forest to the oceans





(made with zero ai)
I give full permission to use my structures in any modpack
if you need support please go to my [thread](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1351667865824137359) in the offical cobblemon discord server!
